WhoWeAre.subtitle: Who We Are
WhoWeAre.title: Every product starts with a great idea. Let's build yours!
WhoWeAre.description1: Goenakan Indonesia is a custom product specialist that works closely with brands to turn ideas into something tangible.
WhoWeAre.description2: Whether you come with a full brief or just a rough idea, we work through every detail until the product feels right, not just visually, but in the hands of whoever receives it.

Footer.aboutUsDesc: Goenakan Indonesia puts sustainability at the core of everything we make, built for brands that understand true quality means doing right by the world, not just delivering a product.

PlanningLargerOrder.heading: Planning a larger order?
PlanningLargerOrder.paragraph1: For larger quantities or specific product requirements, a quotation can be requested.
PlanningLargerOrder.paragraph2: Goenakan Indonesia will help prepare pricing, options, and production details based on the request.

Newsletter.headline: Exclusive deals, specially curated for you!
Newsletter.subheadline: Stay updated on our latest promos, exciting news, and special surprises.
Newsletter.terms: I have read and understood the Privacy and Cookie Policy and agree to receive personalized commercial communications from Goenakan Indonesia via email.

HowItWorks.headline: HOW CUSTOM WORKS
HowItWorks.subheadline: A process that feels clear from the start.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: It can start with a brief, a reference, or even just an idea.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Design and sample are prepared to shape the product.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Once everything is aligned, production moves forward.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Products are shipped to the required destination.

ServiceFeatures.headline: Custom doesn’t have to feel complicated.
ServiceFeatures.subheadline: From finding the right materials to refining the details, the process can get overwhelming. At Goenakan Indonesia, everything is made simpler, so you can move from idea to finished product with ease.
ServiceFeatures.f1Desc: Not every project needs to start big. Selected products can be produced in smaller quantities, making it easier to begin.
ServiceFeatures.f2Desc: Every detail is thoughtfully adjusted, from materials to finishing, to match the purpose of the product.
ServiceFeatures.f3Desc: Samples can be prepared before full production, so you can see and refine the result with clarity.
ServiceFeatures.f4Desc: Products can be delivered across Indonesia and to international destinations, depending on your needs.
ServiceFeatures.f5Desc: A selection of more sustainable materials and product options is available, allowing you to make more conscious choices.
ServiceFeatures.f6Desc: Free shipping is available for orders that meet a certain value, making the process even more convenient.

Occasions.title: Custom products made for different occasions.
Occasions.description: Each project has its own purpose, and each product we make reflects that. Goenakan Indonesia crafts custom products designed to meet your specific needs, whether personal or business.

PortfolioSection.portfolioHeadline: Custom products made for different occasions

UnderConstruction.title: Under Construction
UnderConstruction.description: Sorry, this page is currently being crafted by our team to bring you the best experience. Please check back soon!

AboutTimeline.heading: Every product starts somewhere.
AboutTimeline.subHeading:
Sometimes, it's from a simple request. Sometimes, it's from the desire to create something more meaningful.
Goenakan Indonesia helps bridge that gap. We work with brands and individuals to turn early-stage ideas into custom products that are thoughtfully made, properly produced, and genuinely representative of who you are.

item1.title: A Story That Started Small
item1.description: It began with a very specific request: a Bali resort needed wooden combs engraved with their logo, in a small quantity, on a tight timeline. Products like this were typically sourced overseas in large minimum orders. That single request opened up a bigger question: could custom products be made more flexibly? Goenakan Indonesia was built around that answer.

item2.description: As businesses adapted to a changing environment, so did the demand. Requests shifted toward hampers, branded merchandise, and more personal gifts. It became clear that products aren't just functional objects—they carry meaning, and getting that meaning right matters.

item3.description: More brands came with more varied ideas. Some arrived with fully-formed concepts. Others came with just a rough image or a mood. From this, a more collaborative way of working took shape—connecting ideas to production, and design to reality.

item4.description: Goenakan Indonesia continues to grow as a custom product specialist, helping brands create products that feel considered, personal, and right for their purpose.

ShortStory.title: Short Story
ShortStory.description: Every great project starts with a simple question: "Can we bring this to life?" Whether it begins with a polished sketch or just a spark of an idea, the journey from "nothing" to "something" is one we walk together. At Goenakan Indonesia, we don't just ship orders. We listen, we refine, and we build. We are your partner in every stitch and detail, ensuring your vision becomes a reality you’re proud to hold.

marisa.name: Marisa Permatasari
marisa.bio: Marisa started Goenakan Indonesia with a straightforward vision: to help brands create custom products that are not only visually compelling, but reliably well-made. With experience across hospitality and corporate merchandise projects, she has built Goenakan Indonesia into a trusted partner for brands who care about how their products look, feel, and land.

nadya.name: Nadya Yuniar Desi Prameswari
nadya.bio: Nadya brings depth to Goenakan Indonesia through her focus on product research, strategic partnerships, market expansion, and marketing. She ensures that every product direction is grounded in real insight, while actively building the relationships and reach that help Goenakan Indonesia grow into new markets and opportunities.

group.name: The Goenakan Team
group.bio: Behind every project is a network of craftspeople and production partners who bring ideas to life. The Goenakan Indonesia team coordinates each step of the process, from early concept discussions to final delivery—ensuring quality and consistency throughout.

item1.title: Purposeful Customization
item1.description: Every product is designed with intention. Function, aesthetics, and brand identity are all considered together—not as separate boxes to tick.

item2.title: Attention to Detail
item2.description: The details that seem small often matter most. Materials, finishing, and consistency are held to a careful standard across every order.

item3.title: Reliable Execution
item3.description: A structured process means fewer surprises. Each stage is managed clearly so that timelines and quality can be counted on.

item4.title: Responsible Choices
item4.description: Thoughtful decisions about materials and production methods are part of how we work—not an afterthought.

item5.title: Collaborative by Default
item5.description: Every project is a shared process. Open communication and genuine alignment between both sides leads to better outcomes.
